description_long: This bakery is a two-story structure with a steep, reddish-brown gabled roof and a prominent stone chimney running up one side. The lower portion of the building is constructed from rough stone, while the upper story features smooth, warm beige plaster walls with dark wooden trim. A small wooden balcony and a hanging sign are visible on one side, suggesting commercial use. The entrance is accessed by a short set of stone steps, and a black awning covers the doorway, providing shelter. The building sits on a rectangular paved base, and architectural details such as exposed beams and a mix of stone and wood give it a rustic, European village appearance.
description: A rustic, two-story bakery with a stone base, beige plaster upper walls, a steep red roof, and a prominent stone chimney. Features include a black awning, wooden balcony, and hanging sign.
description_view_0: Side view showing the stone chimney, black awning above the entrance, and the mix of stone and plaster walls.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the gabled roof, central window, stone steps, and the hanging sign on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view with a wooden door on the upper level, stone base, and a small balcony.
description_view_3: Opposite side view dominated by the tall stone chimney and the hanging sign, with no visible entrance.
attribute_storefront_signage: A hanging rectangular sign is visible on the left side of the building, attached to a wooden bracket. The sign appears to have a light background with some faint markings or text, but the details are not clearly legible. The style is rustic, matching the building's overall aesthetic.
attribute_awning_with_bakery_branding: A black awning is present above the main entrance. There is no visible bakery branding, logos, or text on the awning.
attribute_architectural_style: Rustic European village style, characterized by a stone base, plaster upper walls, exposed wooden beams, and a steep gabled roof with a prominent stone chimney.
